U I-13014/4/2007-^.^.-111 ^ MS "#fftPW f^T TO W 1 2110 GI/2010 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PART IIâ€”SEC. 3(ii)1 MINISTRY OF HOME AFFAIRS ORDER New Delhi, the 2nd June, 2010 S.0.1303(E).â€”Whereas the Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Act, 1967 (37of 1967) (hereinafter referred to as the said Act) has been enacted to provide for more effective prevention of certain unlawful activities of individuals and associations and dealing with terrorist activities and for matters connected therewith; 2. And whereas clause (m) of sub-section (i) of Section 2 of the said Act defines the terrorist organisation to mean an organisation listed in the Schedule or an organisation operating under the same name as an organisation so listed; 3. And whereas the Schedule to the said Act specify the list of terrorist organisations; 4. And whereas the Central Government believes that the Indian Mujahideen, all its formations and front organizations is involved in terrorism; 5. Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by clause (a) of sub-section (1) of Section 35 of the Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Act, 1967, the Central Government hereby makes the following order to add the Indian Mujahideen, all its formations and front organisations in the Schedule to the said Act and for that purpose makes the following further amendment, namely:â€” In the Schedule to the said Act, after serial number 34 and entries relating thereto, the following serial number and entries shall be inserted, namely:â€” THE SCHEDULE [See Sections 2 (I), (m) and 35] TERRORIST ORGANISATIONS "35. Indian Mujahideen, all its formations and front organisations". [F. No. 17011/20/2010-IS.-VI] DHARMENDRA SHARMA, Jt. Secy, Note: The Schedule to the Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Act, 1967 was earlier amended vide the order of the Government of India's number (F.No. I-13014/4/2007-NM-III, dated 22nd June, 2009), Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
